description: single-sheet settlement file with one Total row excluded and one source data row that produces web/app outputs

files.description: Sanitized parser-ready rows for the Munpia settlement workbook. Includes one Total row and one normal data row.

notes: This is a parser-ready rows fixture, not a raw XLSX workbook fixture.
Slot meaning is explicit and must not be inferred from the file name.
The Total row is intentionally present in input rows and intentionally absent from expected SettlementRow output.
